
Biomass {data-navmenu="Population"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Spawning Biomass

```{r sb_trend}
mv_plot_trend(
  df         = mv$spawning_biomass,
  ylab       = "Spawning biomass",
  title      = "Spawning Biomass",
  log_buttons = TRUE,
  ref_line   = if (has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$SBmsy))
    mv$ref_points$SBmsy else NULL,
  ref_label  = if (has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$SBmsy))
    "SBmsy" else NULL
)
```

### Legal Biomass

```{r lb_trend}
mv_plot_trend(
  df         = mv$legal_biomass,
  ylab       = "Legal biomass",
  colour     = "#2ca02c",
  title      = "Legal Biomass",
  log_buttons = TRUE,
  ref_line   = if (has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$lBmsy))
    mv$ref_points$lBmsy else NULL,
  ref_label  = if (has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$lBmsy))
    "lBmsy" else NULL
)
```

### Sublegal Biomass

```{r slb_trend}
mv_plot_trend(
  df         = mv$sublegal_biomass,
  ylab       = "Sublegal biomass",
  colour     = "#ff7f0e",
  title      = "Sublegal Biomass",
  log_buttons = TRUE
)
```

### Total Biomass

```{r tb_trend, eval=!is.null(mv$total_biomass)}
mv_plot_trend(
  df         = mv$total_biomass,
  ylab       = "Total biomass",
  colour     = "#9467bd",
  title      = "Total Biomass",
  log_buttons = TRUE
)
```
